creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Marcin,

As per bug 200783, can you please include your patch as an attachment in this issue, as a unified diff against the latest version (head) of the lang mono port.

Please also include QA results (again as attachments), in particular poudriere results. For more information, see:

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/testing.html
